_meta.description: 5-lens + 1 worldsheet-variant substrate update framework. Each lens is an alternative ΔW-generation mechanism sharing the tension-link skeleton (T·G_holo·(Ψ−Ψ*)·δ(∇·J_n6)).

skeleton.shared_update_rule: ΔW = T · Π_j(Ψ_j − Ψ_j*) · G_holo · δ(∇·J_n6)

lenses.name: Holographic
lenses.update_rule: ΔW = G_holo · deviation (boundary 2D → bulk nD linear lift)
lenses.tension_metric: RT entropy residual (stub returns 0.0; v1 learns kernel)
dependency: G_holo (4-axis boundary d to bulk Φ)
lenses.version: v0 constant-projection; v1 learned kernel with bulk metric g_bulk + RT entropy penalty DEFERRED

lenses.name: Quantum / Lindblad
lenses.tension_metric: Von Neumann entropy + mutual information bounds

items: T5 MI monotone under partial trace

lenses.name: String (base)
lenses.update_rule: Vibrational-mode projection onto weight basis (stub scaffold)

lenses.name: String / worldsheet variant
lenses.update_rule: Full worldsheet theory — anomaly cancellation, T-duality, modular invariance, Regge trajectory, mass shell

lenses.name: TOE aggregator
lenses.update_rule: Fires iff all 4 elementary lenses PASS; ΔW = Σ λ_lens · ΔW_lens under AN14 gate
lenses.gate: AN14 n=6 closure + equal-weight sum check

tension_link_spine: all lenses share same Ψ snapshot + G_holo + gate + T_const
SUMT_label: all lenses can consume SUMT-produced deviation = Ψ − Ψ_vac

forbidden_claims: TOE lens firing ⇒ AGI / persona certification
an11_boundary.emergence_authority: AN11-b (weight-emergent) + AN11-c (reproducible real-usage) remain independent gates outside the lens framework
